title: 228pc Universal Deluxe Rotary Tool Accessory Set for Sanding Polishing Cutting
description:
Ideal for just about all jobs that require precision, the 228pc Piece Rotary Tool Set is a unique kit with assorted bits and accessories for every job imaginable. For use with marble, concrete, brick, porcelain, ceramics, epoxy, woods, rock, glass, metal, tile, stone, & more. Whether your craft project is large or small, it most likely has some detail work that requires the right tool for the job. Stick to the basics with this set and you will surely be in good company.

228pc Universal Deluxe Rotary Tool Accessory Set for Sanding Polishing Cutting

Ideal for just about all jobs that require precision, the 228pc Piece Rotary Tool Set is a unique kit with assorted bits and accessories for every job imaginable. For use with marble, concrete, brick, porcelain, ceramics, epoxy, woods, rock, glass, metal, tile, stone, & more.

Key Features

  • Universal Fit for All Rotary Type Tools including Dremel | 1/8th Shank
  • Sanding Band | Rubber Mandrel for Sanding Band | Fiber Glass Cutoff Wheel | Abrasive Wheel
  • 15pc Soft Wool | 9pc Pink Aluminum Oxide | 9pc Green Aluminum Oxide | Polishing Woolen Wheel
  • 30pc Soft Wool | 10pc Hard Wool | Silicon Cutoff Wheel | Aluminum Oxide Cutoff Wheel
  • Stainless Steel Brush | Mounted Abrasive Point | Diamond Burs | HSS Burs/ Drills | HSS Burs/Drills

Product Specifications

  • MPN: dc-145p-194
  • UPC: 753951452625
  • Color: Metal

Whether your craft project is large or small, it most likely has some detail work that requires the right tool for the job. Stick to the basics with this set and you will surely be in good company.
